CVE-2026-14741.title: CVE-2026-14741
CVE-2026-14741.description: parse_date() -- and str2time(), which delegates to it -- used regexes with ambiguous adjacent greedy runs (year/clock/timezone digits and timezone/ASCII-timezone letters) before a trailing anchor. A valid-looking date prefix followed by a long interior run of digits, letters, or whitespace and a trailing junk character forced O(N^2) backtracking, so a ~100 KB string burned tens of seconds of CPU: a denial of service.
